name: Crispy Egg Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine soy sauce, sherry, peanut butter, and sugar. Set aside.
2. Cook ground pork in a stir-fry skillet until browned. Remove the pork, leaving drippings in the skillet.
3. Add mushrooms, celery, green onions, and bean sprouts to the skillet and stir-fry for 1 minute.
4. Add cabbage, shrimp, and water chestnuts to the skillet and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
5. Return the pork and soy sauce mixture to the skillet; heat until warm. Remove from the skillet and let cool.
6. Drain excess liquid.
7. Preheat oil in a stir-fry skillet to 375°F (190°C).
8. While heating the oil, fill each egg roll wrapper with about 1/4 cup of filling, near one corner.
9. Fold the bottom corner over the filling, then fold over the right and left corners.
10. Roll up several times to enclose the filling.
11. To seal, brush the sides and top of the triangle with a mixture of water and cornstarch.
12. Add a few egg rolls at a time to the hot oil and fry until golden, about 2-3 minutes.
13. Drain on paper towels. Serve hot.
